description: IEEE 33-Bus Observed Measurements — Fault: 40-step quasi-static fault/reconfiguration scenario (pre_fault → faulted_isolated → restored, 3-s spacing, 2017-06-07 18:00 UTC). Panels: observed bus voltages with fault_event true overlay (μPMU bus 17 goes dark during isolation), dead-bus count from the re-published event measurement, phase marker, and per-class measurement counts. Queries the measurements bucket — this layer is ADDITIVE and does NOT modify the fault_event or state buckets.

panels.description: Observed bus voltage magnitudes (pu) from the measurements bucket across the 40-step fault event. Target A = measured values (measurements bucket, experiment=fault). Target B = true ground-truth from the fault_event bucket (overlay). Key physics: μPMU at bus 17 goes dark during faulted_isolated (bus 17 is inside the dead zone, energised=0). The gap shows measurement loss: System 2 must reconstruct bus 17 voltage with no sensor during isolation.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "measurements")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T17:59:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T18:03:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.quantity == "vm_pu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "fault")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "fault_event")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T17:59:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T18:03:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "vm_pu")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Observed Bus Voltages (pu) — Fault 40 Steps, Measured vs True

panels.description: Dead-bus count from the re-published event measurement in the measurements bucket (D-07). The n_dead_buses field follows the 0→10→0 pattern: 0 in pre_fault (13 steps), 10 during faulted_isolated (7 steps, buses 8-17 de-energised), 0 again in restored (20 steps). This is the measurement-layer view of the event — querying measurements bucket not fault_event bucket.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "measurements")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T17:59:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T18:03:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "event")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "n_dead_buses")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "fault")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Dead-Bus Count Over Time (measurements bucket event)

panels.description: Phase marker showing the current fault-scenario phase (pre_fault / faulted_isolated / restored) from the re-published event measurement in the measurements bucket. The n_dead_buses field is used as a numeric phase proxy: 0=normal, 10=isolated. Phase tag labels each block. Used to confirm the three-block event structure is correctly re-published into the measurements bucket (D-07).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "measurements")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T17:59:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T18:03:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "event")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "n_dead_buses")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "fault")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Phase Marker — Peak Dead-Bus Count

panels.description: Per-class measurement count across the full 40-step fault scenario. Shows the relative size of each sensor class. In realistic_sparse: μPMU count drops by 2 readings per step during faulted_isolated (bus 17 dark — D-03 gate). AMI count is much lower than snapshot (cadence=10 means AMI is essentially blind during the 2-min fault event). Pseudo count adapts to dead bus exclusion.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "measurements")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T17:59:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T18:03:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "fault")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.class == "pmu")
  |> count()

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "fault")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.class == "scada")
  |> count()

panels.title: Per-Class Measurement Count — Fault

panels.description: Observed-vs-pseudo footprint during the fault scenario: measurement counts per bus location across the 40 steps. During faulted_isolated, buses 8-17 are dark (energised=0, D-03 gate): NO real or pseudo measurements appear for location 8-17. Bus 17 specifically loses its μPMU + DER readings. The footprint changes at each phase transition. Compare with the day footprint to see the reduced-observability challenge for System 2.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "measurements")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T17:59:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T18:03:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "fault")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.class != "pseudo")
  |> group(columns: ["location", "class"])
  |> count()
  |> group()

from(bucket: "measurements")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T17:59:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T18:03:00Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "meas")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.experiment == "fault")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.class == "pseudo")
  |> group(columns: ["location"])
  |> count()
  |> group()

panels.title: Observed-vs-Pseudo Footprint by Bus — Fault (changes at isolation)
